Powerful Features

Crop Prediction

Our neural networks analyze soil health, historical weather patterns, and genetic data to predict harvests with 98.4% accuracy.

Field Analysis

Real-time multispectral imaging and drone telemetry integrated directly into your workflow.

Market Intelligence

Global commodity pricing trends and local supply-demand metrics updated every 60 seconds.

Explore Trends

Universal API

Integrate into your existing irrigation and hardware stack with GraphQL endpoints.

$ forge init --project "napa-valley"
Connecting to soil sensors...

Built for the modern
agricultural engineer.

TerraLogic Forge isn't just a dashboard. It's a high-performance development kit for your land. We provide the primitives you need to build custom automation, predictive models, and resource management systems at scale.

  • Real-time WebSocket telemetry
  • GraphQL API for custom integrations
  • Edge computing support for remote fields
  • Open-source hardware drivers

"The transition from manual tracking to TerraLogic Forge was like moving from a typewriter to a supercomputer."

Dr. Elena Vance
Chief Agronomist, GreenHorizon

One Interface. Complete Mastery.

Stop jumping between tools. TerraLogic provides a unified command center for your entire operation.

Simple, transparent pricing.

Choose the plan that fits your cultivation scale.

Hobbyist

$0/month

Perfect for small gardens and personal experimentation.

  • Up to 5 sensors
  • Basic analytics
  • Community support
  • Public API access

Professional

$49/month

Advanced tools for commercial farms and researchers.

  • Unlimited sensors
  • Predictive AI models
  • Priority support
  • Private API endpoints
  • Edge node support

Enterprise

Custom

Scalable solutions for global agricultural organizations.

  • Custom SLA
  • Dedicated account manager
  • On-premise deployment
  • Custom AI training
  • White-labeling

Frequently Asked Questions

How accurate are the crop yield predictions?
Our models currently achieve a 98.4% accuracy rate across major grain and vegetable categories, based on over 5 years of historical data and real-time sensor feedback.
Can I integrate my own sensors?
Yes! TerraLogic Forge supports a wide range of industry-standard protocols. Our Universal API makes it easy to connect custom hardware via MQTT or HTTP.
Is my data secure and private?
Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption for all data at rest and in transit. You retain full ownership of your agricultural data.
Do you offer on-site setup assistance?
For Enterprise customers, we provide full on-site deployment and training services. Professional users have access to detailed remote onboarding.

Ready to lead the next
Green Revolution?
